SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: CHARTER FUND, INC (THE "FUND OR "CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND") PRIMARILY PROVIDES GRANTS AND LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS THAT MANAGE AND GROW NETWORKS OF SCHOOLS. THE FUND ONLY SUPPORTS ORGANIZATIONS THAT DEMONSTRATE AN IMPACT ON UNDERSERVED STUDENT POPULATIONS AND OUTSTANDING VALUE-ADDED ACADEMIC GAINS. THE FUND FOCUSES ON GEOGRAPHIC AREAS SUPPORTIVE OF FURTHER EXPANSION OF CHARTER SCHOOLS. THE FUND DISTRIBUTED $53,983,999 OF GRANTS TO OR FOR THE BENEFIT OR CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS AND INCURRED ADDITIONAL CHARITABLE EXPENSES OF $19,837,550 DURING THE CALENDAR YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2021. IN ADDITION, THE FUND ISSUED $15,935,301 OF PROGRAM-RELATED INVESTMENT (PRI) LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS DURING THE CALENDAR YEAR ENDING DECEMBER 31, 2021. SEE PART IX-B AND XV FOR A DETAILED LISTING OF LOANS AND GRANTS DURING THE CURRENT YEAR.

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: PRI LOAN TO WASHINGTON CHARTER SCHOOL DEVELOPMENT INC. TO PROMOTE HIGH-QUALITY CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH
SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description2Txt: PRI LOAN TO KIPP NEW YORK, INC. TO PROMOTE HIGH-QUALITY CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH. A LOAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000,000 WAS BOTH GIVEN AND REPAID IN 2021.

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND APPLICATIONS SHOULD BE SUBMITTED ONLINE AT WWW.CHARTERGROWTHFUND.ORG
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.SubmissionDeadlinesTxt: VARIED THROUGHOUT THE YEAR. GO TO OUR WEBSITE TO LEARN MORE: WWW.CHARTERGROWTHFUND.ORG
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: THE CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND IDENTIFIES THE COUNTRY'S BEST NONPROFIT PUBLIC CHARTER SCHOOLS, FUNDS THEIR EXPANSION, AND HELPS TO INCREASE THEIR IMPACT. WE PROVIDE FUNDING AND SUPPORT TO A NATIONAL COMMUNITY OF SCHOOL LEADERS WHO SEEK TO GROW AND SERVE MORE STUDENTS, WHETHER THEY ARE EXPANDING FROM ONE TO TWO SCHOOLS, OR BUILDING A NETWORK OF MANY SCHOOLS. THE CHARTER SCHOOLS AND NETWORKS WE SUPPORT TYPICALLY OPERATE IN UNDERSERVED COMMUNITIES WITH LIMITED ACCESS TO HIGH-QUALITY SCHOOLS. WE FOCUS ON GEOGRAPHIC AREAS SUPPORTIVE OF FURTHER EXPANSION OF HIGH-QUALITY CHARTER SCHOOLS.

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: CHARTER FUND HAS NO REASON TO DOUBT THE ACCURACY OR RELIABILITY OF THE REPORT FROM THE RECIPIENT. THEREFORE, NO INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION OF THE REPORT WAS MADE.
CHARTER FUND HAS NO REASON TO DOUBT THE ACCURACY OR RELIABILITY OF THE REPORT FROM THE RECIPIENT. THEREFORE, NO INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION OF THE REPORT WAS MADE.

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: PRI EQUITY INVESTMENT TO OVERGRAD INC. TO SERVE A NEED AT SCHOOLS WITH LARGE NUMBERS OF LOW-INCOME STUDENTS IN PROVIDING BETTER TOOLS AND INFORMATION SO THAT STUDENTS, FAMILIES AND COUNSELORS CAN MAKE INFORMED DECISIONS ABOUT THEIR POST-SECONDARY PATH. OVERGRAD'S CORE PRODUCT MAKES IT SIMPLE FOR STUDENTS, FAMILIES AND COUNSELORS TO SEARCH FOR COLLEGES, ASSESS ODDS OF ADMISSION, UNDERSTAND PERSONALIZED CHANGES OF GRADUATING FROM SPECIFIC COLLEGES, AND MANAGE THE COLLEGE APPLICATION AND FINANCIAL AID PROCESS.
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: CHARTER FUND HAS NO REASON TO DOUBT THE ACCURACY OR RELIABILITY OF THE REPORT FROM THE RECIPIENT. THEREFORE, NO INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION OF THE REPORT WAS MADE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: PART V, LINE 9 EXCISE TAX DUE
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND ("THE FUND") IS CURRENTLY IN ITS 60 MONTH TERMINATION PERIOD UNDER IRC SECTION 507(B)(1)(B) AND INTENDS TO OPERATE AS A PUBLIC CHARITY DURING THIS TIME. THIS 60 MONTH TERMINATION PERIOD WAS APPROVED BY THE IRS ON DECEMBER 13, 2019 AND EFFECTIVE FOR THE TAX YEAR BEGINNING JANUARY 1, 2020. THE FUND IS NOT REQUIRED TO PAY SECTION 4940 EXCISE TAX DURING ITS ADVANCE RULING PERIOD UNDER TREAS. REG. SECTION 1.507-2(D)(5), EVEN THOUGH THE FORM 990-PF REPORTS EXCISE TAX DUE IN PART V, LINE 9. A COPY OF THIS SIGNED CONSENT TO EXTEND THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS ATTACHED TO THE FORM 990-PF.
